# SessionLedger — LLM / agent entry

OKF-native session compiler: capture, archive, and replay AI agent sessions
losslessly. Turns ephemeral tool sessions into durable ledgers and injectable
**ContinuationBundle** artifacts.

## Start here

| Doc | Why |
|-----|-----|
| [`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md) | Worktrees, build/test/lint, forbidden ops |
| [`docs/DESIGN.md`](docs/DESIGN.md) | Problem, bundle model, pipeline, roadmap |
| [`docs/functional_requirements.md`](docs/functional_requirements.md) | FR-NNN catalog + acceptance refs |
| [`PLAN.md`](PLAN.md) / [`WORK_DAG.md`](WORK_DAG.md) | Claimable tasks + dependency graph |
| [`docs/reference/OKF-SPEC.md`](docs/reference/OKF-SPEC.md) | OKF v1.0 |
| [`docs/OKF-ROUNDTRIP.md`](docs/OKF-ROUNDTRIP.md) | JSONL→daemon→OKF→viewer smoke |
| [`docs/ops/runbook.md`](docs/ops/runbook.md) | Local `make dev` / healthz |
| [`docs/ops/feedback-budgets.md`](docs/ops/feedback-budgets.md) | Measured check/test/lint loop budgets |
| [`docs/ops/observability.md`](docs/ops/observability.md) | Metrics + OTel soft goal |
| [`docs/ops/AGILEPLUS.md`](docs/ops/AGILEPLUS.md) | AgilePlus bootstrap, FR/NFR mapping, and GitHub sync |
| [`docs/adr/0005-no-serverless-edge.md`](docs/adr/0005-no-serverless-edge.md) | No serverless/edge deploy (C11 L114) |
| [`docs/adr/0001-desktop-companion-scope.md`](docs/adr/0001-desktop-companion-scope.md) | No tray/auto-update; user-initiated check (C11 L111) |
| [`docs/ops/update-check.md`](docs/ops/update-check.md) | `sl-daemon check-update` — compare to GitHub latest (no install) |
| [`docs/adr/0006-no-mcp-server.md`](docs/adr/0006-no-mcp-server.md) | No MCP host/server / pin list (C06 L57) |

## Key paths

```
crates/sl-daemon/     HTTP API + ETL watcher (ingest/search/replay/metrics)
crates/sl-viewer/     Dioxus desktop: Timeline, Search, Replay, LiveFeed
src/domain/           Session, bundle, dedup, intent FSM
src/export/okf.rs     OKF exporter
src/ports/            CorpusSource, MemoryStore, TraceSink, OkfExporter
tests/okf_roundtrip.rs
docs/functional_requirements.md
```

## Build / test

```bash
cargo build --all-targets --locked
cargo test  --all-features --locked
cargo test -p sl-daemon
cargo test -p session-ledger --test okf_roundtrip
cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features
cargo fmt --all --check
make dev          # process-compose: daemon :8080 + viewer
```

## API (daemon, default :8080)

`GET /healthz` · `GET /api/bundles` · `GET /api/search` · `GET /api/stream` ·
`GET /api/replay/:id` · `POST /api/ingest` · `GET /api/metrics`
